title: Smoky Kenyan Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice bowl dish inspired by Kenya's rich culinary heritage, featuring the deep, smoky taste of Kenyan spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the smoky and kenyan spices and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve with pancakes on top.
Optional: garnish with chopped herbs or a dollop of yogurt.
